creator: erwan@rail.eu.org
text:
Whe doing make config for vlc (vlc-1.0.4,3), I chose to make a streaming only vlc, however, it wants to install qt4-gui and X11 dependencies.

Moreover other options are not treated correctly, since I see the following warnings :

configure: WARNING: unrecognized options: --disable-arts, --disable-esd, --with-ffmpeg-faac
